# VIBEMENOW

> High-performance, mobile-first collection of 13+ daily games.

## Core Tech
- Next.js 15 (App Router)
- React 19
- Vanilla CSS (Glassmorphism design system in `app/globals.css`)
- Firebase (Real-time DB / Auth)
- Three.js (3D graphics)

## Project Structure
- `/app`: Routing and core logic. Each subdirectory is a game route.
- `/app/components`: Shared UI (SiteLayout, GameEndScreen).
- `/app/lib`: Utilities (Firebase config).
- `/public`: Static assets.

## Key Files
- `PROJECT_REFERENCE.md`: Detailed architecture guide.
- `app/globals.css`: Global design system and aesthetic tokens.
- `app/layout.js`: Global SEO, scripts, and shell.
- `next.config.mjs`: Technical SEO and domain redirects.

## Development
- `npm run dev`: Start development server.
- `npm run build`: Production build.
- `node fix-metadata.js`: Maintenance script for SEO.
